mapper.sql: A.SSVC_HGROUP_CD, A.SSVC_MGROUP_CD, A.SSVC_LGROUP_CD, A.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD A

SELECT 'VL'||TRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(DECODE(MAX(RIGHT(SSVC_LGROUP_CD,4)),NULL,'0000',MAX(RIGHT(SSVC_LGROUP_CD,4))))+1, '0000')) AS ssvcLgroupCd FROM MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD WHERE SSVC_LGROUP_CD ILIKE 'VL%'
